name: entails_apply_closure_bridge
reason: entails_apply is external_body bridging valid(p.implies(q)) — a forall over TempPred::new closure evaluations — to modus ponens at a specific execution without proof

name: temp_pred_equality_intensional_bridge
reason: temp_pred_equality is external_body forcing intensional equality from mutual entailment — structurally distinct closures collapsed to equal without proof

name: entails_and_temp_closure_bridge
reason: entails_and_temp is external_body combining two entailments into an entailment of p.and(q) — requires resolving that p.and(q)'s TempPred::new closure evaluates to the conjunction of the individual closure results

name: mutual_entailment_derives_false_if_distinct
reason: temp_pred_equality forces p == q from mutual entailment — if two preds are intensionally distinct but semantically equivalent this derives false

name: simplify_predicate_equality
reason: simplify_predicate forces intensional equality between p and p.and(q) — structurally distinct closures (p.pred vs conjunction closure) collapsed to equal via the chain of all three external_body axioms
